response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed video to identify Murasaki Shion as the performer.
2. Observed on-screen text for song identification:
   - 00:00: "時ノ雨、最終戦争" / "作詞・作曲: Orangestar"
   - 04:29: "ただ声一つ" / "作詞・作曲: MIMI"
3. Performed web searches for both songs to get lyrics:
   - Search 1: `"時ノ雨、最終戦争" Orangestar Japanese and English lyrics`
   - Search 2: `"ただ声一つ" MIMI Japanese and English lyrics`
4. Formatted the output into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A performance by the VTuber Murasaki Shion featuring two songs: "Toki no Ame, Saishuu Sensou" by Orangestar, and "Tada Koe Hitotsu" by MIMI.

scenes.description: Murasaki Shion performs the song "Toki no Ame, Saishuu Sensou" (Drizzle, The Last War) by Orangestar. The title and composer appear on screen at the beginning.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
答えて ねぇ
にわか雨が寄せる街の夜へ
沈む世界 感覚遡行
「きっと僕ら生まれながら
何処にもないコタエを探してる」
応えて ねぇ 叶えて 何を？
『今日の世界はいかがです？』
きっと言われずとも 君は君を知っているだろうともさ
けどまだ信じられぬだろう
終わる日々の果てで
泣き出したその彼方
終わらない戦と悪が咲いて
なんてただ期待も無い
なんて君は君をかき消した
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Answer me, please. I’m trying to fight the course of my emotions as the world sinks into the night on the streets visited by a sudden shower.
"Surely we were born searching for an answer that doesn't exist anywhere."
Answer me, please. Grant it. What? "How is the world today?"
Even if I'm not told, surely you know yourself. But I still cannot believe it.
At the end of the day, when it ends.
If I cry, the answer is...
At the end of the day, when the rain falls again.
If I cry while living, until I can laugh while repeating it.
If I cry while living, until I can laugh while repeating it.

scenes.description: Murasaki Shion performs the song "Tada Koe Hitotsu" (One Voice) by MIMI. The title and composer appear on screen at 04:29.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
続く 時間の欠片を
集めている ただ過ぎる
ノートの余白に書く
「答えは、いつ？」
ほんのり小さな感情へ
愛をひとつ
またね またね
夜に咲く温度と灯るまで
呼吸 ひとつ
生きる 生きる
優しい日々の横で
泣かぬように
あぁ 泣かぬように
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I'm only collecting fragments of time
That goes by endlessly
I write in the margins of my notebook, "When is the answer?"
To a slightly small emotion
Just one love
See you again, see you again
Until the warmth that blooms in the night and the light shines
Just one breath
I'll live, I'll live, beside the gentle days so that I won't cry
Ah, so that I won't cry
I'm only collecting fragments of time that go by endlessly
I write in the margins of my notebook, "When is the answer?"
Just one voice.
